text_preview:
- 01. REG. n. 051

- 02. PLACE: Quiririm Canal – Baia do Marajó-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 27 NOV 77- at 02: 4-0 hours

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Reddish yellow

- 06. FORM: Undefined

- 07. APPARENT SIZE:. . .

- 08. MOVEMENT: Straight trajectory, in the Southeast / Northwest direction

- 09. SPEED: Low

- 10. ALTITUDE: 40 cm (estimated)

- 11. DISTANCE: 5.000m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): Mr ELIAS DE OLIVEIRA

- 13. NOTE: The UFO was observed moving from Ponta do Machadinho, crossing over Ponta do Bacuri, then to the sea (Northwest).

- 01. REG. n. 052

- 02. PLACE: COLA
location: Colares / Mosqueiro / Canal do Navio, Pará
summary: Operação Prato reports 051–060: ten luminous-body sightings Nov–Dec 1977 in Pará; multiple observers including military team ICOMAR tracked objects making supersonic maneuvers over Colares.
